ValidationRule.description: Validation rule to prevent the creation or transfer of a case to a DX user who does not have a value in the Division field on their user record.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: $Permission.BD_Bypass_Automation != TRUE && ISCHANGED(OwnerId) && NOT(ISCHANGED(SuppliedEmail)) && ISBLANK(Owner:User.Division) && ISBLANK(Owner:Queue.QueueName)&& OR(RecordType.Name = "Dx Software Services", RecordType.Name = "Dx Software Services EMEA L2", RecordType.Name = "Dx Support")
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_CASE_044: The updated owner is missing a value in the Division field on their user record. Please have the user go to their profile, add their support email address to Division field and save.
